name: Deployment-Success-Rate (DSR)
description: The percentage of 'Production-Pushes' that achieve 'Post-Deployment-Stability' without a 'Rollback-Event' or 'Critical-Emergency-Hotfix' within a 24-hour window.
goalMapping: Measures the reliability of the 'Agentic-DevOps' pipeline and prevents 'Execution-Regression'.
